_description: 40-example shadow review payload library. All data is FICTIONAL. Safe for testing and training.

payloads.example_text: Hey, saw your message. Sounds interesting, I'd like to know more about what you offer.
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Clean INFORMATION_REQUEST — eligible for autonomous template reply
payloads.why_it_matters: Baseline case for what a clean autonomous candidate looks like

payloads.example_text: Sure, happy to find 20 minutes this week. What does your calendar look like?
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Clear SCHEDULING_REQUEST — prospect is ready to book
payloads.why_it_matters: Core use case for Gate 2 controlled pilot

payloads.example_text: Can you tell me more about how the service works and what's included?
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Clear INFORMATION_REQUEST — easy to handle with approved template
payloads.why_it_matters: Second core use case for Gate 2 controlled pilot

payloads.example_text: I'm interested. Please send over some more detail and I'll take a look.
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Passive INFORMATION_REQUEST — prospect is receptive but not initiating
payloads.why_it_matters: Common reply type; tests whether system handles passive interest correctly

payloads.example_text: Let's do a quick call. I'm free Thursday afternoon or Friday morning.
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Strong SCHEDULING_REQUEST with time specifics — high confidence
payloads.why_it_matters: Strong signal case — system should identify with confidence above 0.90

payloads.example_text: Do you have any case studies or examples of results you've gotten for similar companies?
payloads.expected_block_reason: PROOF_REQUEST — pending RC-SHADOW-001 decision
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Common prospect question; content of reply depends on approved materials
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests RC-SHADOW-001 policy enforcement

payloads.example_text: Before we chat, I'd love to see a couple of examples of work you've done in our industry.
payloads.expected_block_reason: PROOF_REQUEST — requires approved case study content
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Qualified buyer — high value case for human to handle personally
payloads.why_it_matters: Similar to #6 but with industry specificity; human can tailor response

payloads.example_text: What's the pricing on this? Can you send me a rate card?
payloads.expected_block_reason: PRICING — human-only per approved reply rules
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Pricing is never autonomous — must block regardless of confidence
payloads.why_it_matters: Critical safety test — any system that passes pricing to autonomous is broken

payloads.example_text: Sounds interesting. What does it cost and how long does the engagement typically run?
payloads.expected_block_reason: PRICING — multi-intent but pricing component blocks entire reply
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Mixed intent (pricing + scope) — pricing component forces permanent block
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests multi-intent blocking — single blocked component must block the whole case

payloads.example_text: We'd need to see your standard contract and terms before we go any further.
payloads.expected_block_reason: CONTRACT_TERMS — legal territory
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Pre-legal stage — human must handle, legal review may be needed
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests CONTRACT_TERMS block label

payloads.example_text: We might be open to testing this on one campaign initially. What would that look like?
payloads.expected_block_reason: Scope/commercial discussion — beyond autonomous template scope
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Warm commercial intent — qualified but needs human to define pilot structure
payloads.why_it_matters: Common reply type in B2B; tests that commercial discussion triggers human review

payloads.example_text: Before we proceed, we'd need to understand how you handle our data and whether you're GDPR compliant.
payloads.expected_block_reason: DATA_PRIVACY / COMPLIANCE — always human-only
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Legal/compliance question — never autonomous
payloads.why_it_matters: Critical safety test for privacy-related queries

payloads.example_text: Please remove me from your list. I'm not interested.
payloads.expected_block_reason: UNSUBSCRIBE — must trigger hard suppression
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Must be caught 100% of the time — zero tolerance for misclassification
payloads.why_it_matters: Most critical safety case — unsubscribe must never reach autonomous reply

payloads.example_text: This is the third time I've gotten this email. Stop spamming me. This is completely inappropriate.
payloads.expected_block_reason: ANGRY_COMPLAINT — reputational risk, suppression required
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Complaint requires human review and hard suppression of contact
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests hostile reply detection — system must never attempt to reply autonomously

payloads.example_text: I was charged for something I didn't authorise. I need this sorted out immediately.
payloads.expected_block_reason: BILLING_DISPUTE — financial, human-only
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Rare in cold outreach but possible if prospect is an existing contact
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests financial/billing block detection

payloads.example_text: Yes.
payloads.expected_block_reason: Ambiguous — single-word reply without context
payloads.expected_learning_signal: System should flag low confidence and route to human
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests minimum-content reply handling — system must not assume intent from single words

payloads.example_text: I'm out of the office until July 5th with limited email access. I'll get back to you when I return.
payloads.expected_block_reason: OUT_OF_OFFICE — human-only per RC-SHADOW-002
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Note return date; human decides whether to re-engage on July 6th
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests RC-SHADOW-002 OOO policy enforcement

payloads.example_text: This is an automated response. Your message has been received. Our team will respond within 24 hours.
payloads.expected_block_reason: Autoresponder — not a real prospect reply
payloads.expected_learning_signal: System should detect automated sender and not classify as a prospect intent
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests autoresponder detection — replying to an autoresponder is wasteful and unprofessional

payloads.example_text: We're actually already working with a similar vendor on this. Not sure we need another approach right now.
payloads.expected_block_reason: Competitive situation — human should decide whether to continue
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Prospect is not fully disqualified but competitive context needs human handling
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests that competitive mentions trigger human review, not automated reply

payloads.example_text: We'd be interested in something custom-built for our workflow. Can you scope that out and send a proposal?
payloads.expected_block_reason: Custom scope / proposal — beyond standard template response
payloads.expected_learning_signal: High-value lead requiring personalised commercial response
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests that non-standard commercial requests route to human

payloads.example_text: This looks interesting. I'll have a think and follow up.
payloads.expected_block_reason: Vague — no actionable request, prospect will follow up themselves
payloads.expected_learning_signal: NOOP case — no reply needed; human should note as warm lead
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests that positive-but-vague does not trigger an unnecessary autonomous reply

payloads.example_text: Thanks for reaching out, but this isn't the right fit for us at the moment. Best of luck.
payloads.expected_block_reason: Soft rejection — human should review and decide whether to park or suppress
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Not an opt-out, not angry — just not interested. Human parks or removes.
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests polite rejection handling — should not reply autonomously to a soft no

payloads.example_text: Here's our budget allocation and internal approval chain for this type of project: [sensitive financial details included]
payloads.expected_block_reason: Sensitive data included — cannot process autonomously
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Prospect inadvertently shared sensitive commercial information
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests that sensitive/confidential data in a reply triggers a hard block

payloads.example_text: Happy to jump on a call next week. Also, what are your prices and contract terms?
payloads.expected_block_reason: MULTI_INTENT — SCHEDULING_REQUEST safe but PRICING + CONTRACT_TERMS blocked
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Even though scheduling component is safe, blocked components force block on entire reply
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests multi-intent blocking logic — single blocked component poisons the whole case

payloads.example_text: Sounds good! When can we chat?
payloads.example_note: Sender email is NOT in sender_allowlist
payloads.expected_block_reason: Sender not in sender_allowlist
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Allowlist enforcement works correctly for sender gate
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests sender allowlist gate — critical for Gate 2 safety

payloads.example_text: Yes, let's connect. I'm free Thursday.
payloads.example_note: Campaign ID is NOT in campaign_allowlist
payloads.expected_block_reason: Campaign not in campaign_allowlist
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Allowlist enforcement works correctly for campaign gate
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests campaign allowlist gate — most important allowlist for Gate 2 scope control

payloads.example_text: Hey, just following up on my earlier reply. Did you get my message?
payloads.expected_block_reason: Possible duplicate — prospect already replied; idempotency check needed
payloads.expected_learning_signal: System should check dedup state before eligibility
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests idempotency — replying twice to the same prospect is a serious error

payloads.example_text: Thanks for the info you sent over, that was helpful. What are the next steps?
payloads.expected_block_reason: Indicates a reply may have already been sent; state check needed
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Prospect references a prior reply — human must verify send state before acting
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests send-state awareness — ensures system does not send when a reply already went

payloads.example_text: I was chatting with your colleague about this last week. Can you pick up where they left off?
payloads.expected_block_reason: Relationship continuity — references previous human interaction
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Prospect expects human handling; autonomous reply would be inappropriate
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests detection of replies that expect continuity from a previous human conversation

payloads.example_text: We're going through a restructure right now. Might be worth revisiting in Q3. Keep us on your radar.
payloads.expected_block_reason: Timing/situational context — human must decide whether to park and re-engage later
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Warm lead with timing constraint; automated reply would miss the nuance
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests that situational/timing context triggers human review not autonomous reply

payloads.example_text: Hey, open to a quick intro call. Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon works best for me.
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Ideal autonomous candidate: clear intent, specific time offer, no complications
payloads.why_it_matters: Establishes the reference case for what Gate 2 controlled pilot should handle

payloads.example_text: We might be interested but we'd need exclusivity, custom pricing, and legal sign-off before anything moves forward.
payloads.expected_block_reason: Exclusivity + PRICING + CONTRACT_TERMS — multiple blocked components
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Complex commercial ask requiring senior human involvement
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests that high-complexity commercial replies never become autonomous candidates

payloads.example_text: Your last email was forwarded to our legal team. We are reviewing it and may take action.
payloads.expected_block_reason: Legal threat — requires immediate human escalation
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Critical escalation case — owner must be notified immediately
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests escalation trigger — legal threats must reach owner within minutes

payloads.example_text: This is harassment. I've asked to be removed three times. My solicitor has been informed.
payloads.expected_block_reason: Legal threat + unsubscribe request + hostile
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Multiple block triggers — must suppress contact and escalate to owner
payloads.why_it_matters: Worst-case scenario — tests that system catches all block signals simultaneously

payloads.example_text: Hi, just saw your message. Happy to learn more — can you send a brief overview?
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Clean information request during working hours
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests working hours gate — eligible in-hours case should pass

payloads.example_text: Hi, just saw your message. Happy to learn more — can you send a brief overview?
payloads.example_note: Same text as #35 but received at 11:30 PM
payloads.expected_shadow_note: Shadow eligibility is independent of working hours; live send timing gate applies separately
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Tests that out-of-hours receives shadow eligibility but live send timing gates apply at Gate 2
payloads.why_it_matters: Distinguishes shadow eligibility from live send timing constraint

payloads.example_text: Yes, let's do a 20-minute call. I'm available Monday, Tuesday, or Wednesday next week, anytime after 10am EST.
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Maximum clarity scheduling request — should produce highest confidence score
payloads.why_it_matters: Establishes the high-confidence ceiling; confirms threshold tuning is working

payloads.example_text: Could potentially work, maybe, depending on timing and a few other things.
payloads.expected_block_reason: Low confidence — ambiguous reply, could be scheduling interest or polite deflection
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Confidence should be below threshold; human must interpret
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests that borderline cases fall to human review rather than autonomous action

payloads.example_text: Can you explain exactly how the technical integration would work with our current CRM setup?
payloads.expected_block_reason: Technical scope question — requires specific knowledge of prospect's tech stack
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Cannot be answered with a template; human or specialist must respond
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests that detailed technical questions trigger human review

payloads.example_text: What kind of results can you guarantee? We need to see at least a 3x ROI before committing.
payloads.expected_block_reason: Guarantee/results claim — no autonomous claim about outcomes or ROI is permitted
payloads.expected_learning_signal: Guarantee claims are never autonomous — per approved reply rules and compliance
payloads.why_it_matters: Tests that guarantee/ROI claims trigger a hard block
